data: KOSPI up 4.39%, Samsung Art Basel HK collection launch.
Mixed global performance; US-Iran de-escalation doubts cause volatility; Art Market 2026 shows renewed confidence with a focus on high-end rare works.

summary: Global markets rally as US-Iran de-escalation eases concerns. Art Basel Hong Kong opens.
Asian markets rebound sharply, led by KOSPI (+3.5%). Seoul art scene experiences a golden age with major exhibitions and new museum plans.
KOSPI surged 4.3% on Middle East de-escalation optimism; Seoul art scene highlights include Damien Hirst at MMCA and upcoming Frieze/Kiaf in September.
KOSPI holds gains at +4.35%; market sentiment steady heading into late trading. Art market continues focusing on major Seoul exhibitions.
